NOTICE OF HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN, PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 71022051) FILED BY PETITIONER URBAN POINT SF, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY HEARING SET FOR NOV-01-2023 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 501
MINUTE ORDER RE: DENYING WITHOUT PREJUDICE PETITIONER'S MOTION TO SERVE PROCESS ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, URBAN POINT SF, LLC'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 20, 2023 FOR THE MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE NOTICE TO THE RESPONDENT, A SUSPENDED CORPORATION, IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE LAW REGARDING SUSPENDED CORPORATIONS. PROOF OF SERVICE MUST BE FILED NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 16, 2023. ALTERNATIVELY, PETITIONER MAY FILE A SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEF NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 16, 2023 (NOT TO EXCEED 3 PAGES) CITING AUTHORITIES SUPPORTING THE VALIDITY OF SERVICE ON A DECEASED AGENT FOR PROCESS OF SERVICE FOR A SUSPENDED CORPORATION. PETITIONER MAY APPEAR EX PARTE IN DEPARTMENT 501 TO SEEK AN ORDER AUTHORIZING SERVICE OF PROCESS ON THE SECRETARY OF STATE, IF NECESSARY. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Verified Petition For Release Of Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Ross N. Steinbach; Smith Currie & Hancock LLP; 415-394-6688; appearing as counsel for Petitioner Urban Point SF, LLC.

Counsel for Petitioner contests the court's tentative ruling, and requests that the court rule on their petition today, or alternatively, continue hearing to the week of December 20th, as they have a conflict with December 8th. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

URBAN POINT SF, LLC'S PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC'S LIEN is continued to December 20, 2023 for the moving party to provide notice to the respondent, a suspended corporation, in accordance with the law regarding suspended corporations. Proof of service must be filed no later than November 16, 2023. Alternatively, Petitioner may file a supplemental brief no later than November 16, 2023 (not to exceed 3 pages) citing authorities supporting the validity of service on a deceased agent for process of service for a suspended corporation. Petitioner may appear ex parte in Department 501 to seek an order authorizing service of process on the Secretary of State, if necessary.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
